reason: Planner open question ( answer before spec approval): Where is cleanup-dispatch-stop.sh currently located in the user's system? The task states "~/.claude/hooks/", but I found no matches in the repo. Need to clarify absolute vs relative path for copying.
resume_instructions: Then re-run: pi --provider ollama --model gemma4:12b-mlx -e .pi/extensions/damage-control.ts -e .pi/extensions/cc-orchestrator.ts --no-builtin-tools -p 'Resume pipeline'
